name: CodeWorks 2025: College/Career Fair Vendor Registration
description:
Thank you for your interest in joining our upcoming Career Fair! This event is part of CodeWorks, a YouthWorks summer program that provides Baltimore youth with hands-on experience in coding, technology, and workforce development. The Career Fair is designed to help students build confidence and practice essential job-readiness skills by engaging with professionals across a variety of industries.

Whether or not you currently have internships, volunteer roles, or community service opportunities available, we’d still love for you to attend! Your presence gives our youth a valuable opportunity to learn about your organization, explore different career paths, and practice pitching themselves to real-world professionals. Thank you for supporting their growth and success!

Event Logistics:
Date: Friday, August 1, 2025
Time: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
Vendor Arrival for Setup: Please arrive by 8:00 AM
Location: 81 Mosher Street, Baltimore, MD 21217
Breakfast will be provided!
More details about the day will be shared soon!

Please complete this form by Friday, July 25, 2025
We’re excited to have you join us and inspire the next generation of Baltimore’s workforce!
